dag.description: Shared DAG definition for Bedrock Batch Data Processing Pipeline

agent_context.when_to_use: Data enrichment/labeling only — you want Bedrock batch to process text data (classify, extract, summarize) but do NOT need downstream training in the same pipeline.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: If you need training after processing (use bedrock_batch_pytorch_e2e). If data volume is <100K rows (use realtime bedrock_pytorch_e2e).
differentiators: Data processing only — no training node
Cost-efficient batch API (50% cheaper than realtime for >100K rows)
Output goes to S3 for downstream consumption by any pipeline

prerequisites.how: Input JSONL formatted per Bedrock batch spec

common_pitfalls: Batch input must be JSONL with specific schema — validate before submitting
Batch jobs are async — pipeline must poll for completion
Output needs post-processing to extract structured fields from LLM responses
